hero.headline: Be Your Own
hero.description: We create experiences beyond the classroom — into the real world through adventure, culture, and hands-on learning.

preview.title: Every experience is designed to help you grow through doing
preview.schoolsDescription: Custom local and international programs for primary through secondary schools — built around your learning objectives and group size.
preview.weekendDescription: Short, immersive weekend experiences in Saudi nature — built for connection, confidence, and lasting memories.

abdul.name: Abdul Explorer
abdul.credential: First Saudi to ski to the North Pole
abdul.tagline: If I can, You Can, We All Can.
abdul.description: Camp Explorer carries the same mindset Abdul brought to standing on top of the world — that growth lives at the edge of comfort.

closingCta.title: Ready to step out of your comfort zone?
closingCta.description: This is more than an experience. This is where growth begins.

metadata.title: About
metadata.description: Camp Explorer is built to take learning beyond the classroom — led by Abdul Explorer, the first Saudi to ski to the North Pole.

hero.headline: Where young people step outside
hero.subhead: Built to take learning beyond the classroom — into the real world.
hero.imageAlt: Abdul Explorer with local children in a yurt during a Central Asian expedition

mission.title: Camp Explorer was created to redefine how people learn
mission.body: We believe that learning should not be limited to classrooms. The most powerful growth happens when individuals step into real environments, face challenges, and experience the world first-hand.

pillars.confidence: This is where confidence is built

philosophy.lead: At Camp Explorer, everything we do is built on one belief:
philosophy.headline: Real experiences create real growth

founder.name: Abdul Explorer
founder.intro: Abdul Explorer is a Saudi adventurer who has pushed his limits across the world — becoming the first Saudi to ski to the North Pole and stand on top of the world (90°N).
founder.tagline: His journeys were never about records. They were about proving something simple:
founder.quote: If I can, you can. We all can.
founder.bridge: Through Camp Explorer, he brings that mindset to the next generation — creating experiences that challenge individuals, build confidence, and unlock potential. From extreme expeditions to youth-focused programs, his journey is built on pushing limits and inspiring others to do the same.
founder.closing: This isn't about watching. It's about stepping in, taking action, and discovering what you're truly capable of.

contact.title: Talk to us before you go
contact.description: Questions about a program, a school booking, or whether your child is ready?

overview.title: Experience the wild, responsibly
overview.body: Spend the core of the program immersed in a protected elephant sanctuary in Mondulkiri, focusing on ethical conservation and environmental learning, then transition into a guided jungle expedition through Keo Seima Wildlife Sanctuary.

items.title: Elephant Conservation
items.subtitle: Mondulkiri
items: Observe rescued elephants in their natural forest environment (no riding)
Daily conservation routines: food preparation, forest walks
Learn each elephant's history, rehabilitation, and behavior
Connect wildlife conservation with local communities

items.title: Jungle Expedition
items.subtitle: Keo Seima
items: Guided trekking through Keo Seima Wildlife Sanctuary
Track gibbons, macaques, and tropical bird species
Day and night jungle walks with expert local guides
Overnight stay in a remote forest bamboo camp

items.title: Cultural Immersion
items: Visit a local Bunong village
Traditional cooking experience
Group reflection and discussion sessions
Cultural introduction in Phnom Penh
Ethical elephant conservation in a natural forest setting
Wild jungle trekking and wildlife tracking in protected reserves
Cultural immersion with Bunong communities and traditions
Balanced program combining impact, adventure, and education

abdul.title: A guided youth expedition
items: Structured orientation and daily engagement sessions
Guided reflection and group discussions
Focus on leadership, teamwork, and personal development
Carefully curated balance of challenge, learning, and fun
Structured daily program
1–2 adults per 10 participants
Risk assessments in place
On-ground support

overview.title: Protecting what matters
overview.body: Join an unforgettable 11-day youth experience in Sri Lanka, combining wildlife conservation, community engagement, and adventure travel. Participants work on a turtle conservation project while engaging with local communities through creative teaching sessions. Hands-on, meaningful, and culturally immersive.

items.title: Turtle Conservation
items.subtitle: Morning Activities
items: Care for injured and rescued sea turtles
Support rehabilitation and release back into the ocean
Protect turtle eggs and hatcheries
Beach clean-ups to protect nesting areas
Learn about endangered species

items.title: Teaching & Community Engagement
items.subtitle: Afternoons
items: Conduct fun, creative sessions with local students
English conversation
Games & interactive learning
Team-building activities

items.title: Weekend Adventure
items: Wildlife safari — elephants, leopards in their natural habitat
Trek through hill country to panoramic viewpoints
Visit waterfalls and tea plantations
Explore historic towns with expert guides
Work with 5 different turtle species in Sri Lanka
Make a real environmental impact through conservation
Combine volunteering, adventure, and cultural immersion
Develop confidence, teamwork, and global awareness

abdul.title: A guided youth expedition
items: Daily evening activities and group challenges
Adventure-focused itinerary
Cultural immersion (local dress & cooking experience)
Full guidance and leadership throughout the trip
Structured daily program
1–2 adults per 10 participants
Risk assessments in place
On-ground support

hero.title: Choose your expedition
hero.intro: Immersive international and local experiences for young explorers aged 14–18 — designed to build confidence, awareness, and a lifelong sense of adventure.
